title: DS-PearlFix
description: Solve that disgusting EnderPearl glitch now
body:
![DS-PearlFix Banner](https://imgur.com/W3850cb.png) # **DS-PearlFix** ### *Solve that disgusting EnderPearl glitch now* [![Maintained by FruitForge Studios](https://img.shields.io/badge/Maintained%20by-FruitForge%20Studios-4da6ff?style=for-the-badge)](https://fruitforge.com) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1332150488753246310?color=7289da&label=Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://fruitforge.com/discord)
--- I would appreciate it if you were kind when reviewing, and if you have a problem or complaints, feel free to send them to my Official [Discord](https://discord.dragonstudio.site/). The comments section is not for that. ## **Why Choose DS-PearlFix?** DS-PearlFix is the perfect miscellaneous to help you with the horrible and horrendous error that allows you to pass through walls and violate buildings with the EnderPearl.
### 📖 **[FULL DOCUMENTATION HERE](https://docs.fruitforge.com/)** 📖
## **✨ Core Features** ### **🛡️ Advanced Protection** - **Robust Glitch Detection** - Detects EnderPearl teleport exploits - **Automatic Correction** - Prevents players from bypassing walls - **Violation Notifications** - Alerts staff of exploit attempts - **Lightweight Solution** - Minimal performance impact ## **📋 Commands & Permissions** ### **Commands:** ``` /pearlfix reload ➜ Reload the plugin configuration ``` ### **Permissions:** ``` pearlfix.bypass ➜ Bypass plugin security pearlfix.reload ➜ Reload config pearlfix.message ➜ Receive notifications from abusive users ``` ## **📦 Requirements & Compatibility** ### **Supported Versions:** - Minecraft 1.13 - 1.21.7 - Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish ## **🎬 Live Demonstration** ![DS-PearlFix Demo](https://imgur.com/3KC5KQ0.gif) ---
